CONTENT.Honours: RomaUEFA Europa Conference League: 2021–22UEFA Europa League runner-up: 2022–23
CONTENT.Club career: Kumbulla made his professional debut for Hellas Verona on 12 August 2018, starting in a 2–0 away loss to Catania in the Coppa Italia.On 17 September 2020, Kumbulla joined Roma on loan with an obligation to buy.On 1 February 2024, Kumbulla moved on loan to Sassuolo.
CONTENT.External links: Marash Kumbulla at the A.S. Roma websiteMarash Kumbulla – UEFA competition record (archive)Marash Kumbulla at L'Équipe Football (in French)Marash Kumbulla at National-Football-Teams.comMarash Kumbulla at SoccerwayMarash Kumbulla at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 19 May 2024As of match played 3 June 2024
CONTENT.International career: Kumbulla made his senior debut for the Albania national team on 14 October 2019, in a 4–0 away win against Moldova in a Euro 2020 qualifier. He came on for Ardian Ismajli in the 89th minute.

SUMMARY: Marash Nikolin Kumbulla (born 8 February 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Roma. Born in Italy, he plays for the Albania national team.
